subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached this Station wherefrom the Mother Book was witnessed above its horizon, and We took it with Our hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک فی المقام الذی کان ام الکتاب عن افقه مشهودا و اخذناه بید
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
